name: Fudgey Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped nuts or use 3/4 cup angel flake coconut
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate with butter in a saucepan over very low heat, stirring constantly until smooth. Remove from heat.
2. Mix flour, salt, and baking powder.
3. Beat eggs thoroughly.
4. Gradually beat in sugar.
5. Blend in chocolate mixture and vanilla.
6. Add flour mixture; stir well.
7. Stir in nuts (or angel flake coconut).
8. Spread batter in a greased 8-inch square pan.
9. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes (moist, chewy brownies) or about 30 minutes (cake-like brownies). Cool in the pan, then cut into squares or bars.
10. Yield: 20 brownies. Note: The recipe may be doubled. Bake in a greased 13" x 9-inch square pan for 25-30 minutes.
